svg.title: TokenFlow Lab agent design patterns for deliberate token spend
svg.desc: Eight LangChain4j Agentic patterns: router, triage, context compression, retrieval augmented generation, tool use, step-back planning, caching, and batching. Savings figures are projections; batching emphasizes throughput and does not claim automatic token savings.

g.text: Agent design patterns for deliberate token spend
Escalate only when complexity earns it
The large model never sees the full transcript
Retrieve evidence instead of sending the corpus
Resolve the frame before expensive execution
Planning pays when it prevents retries and rework
A repeated answer can make zero model calls
Exact hit avoids generation; miss fills the cache
Lower wall time, same content-token work
Percentages are modeled projections, not guarantees. Live mode reads provider usage; demo mode estimates ≈4 characters/token.
Validate every optimization with task quality, latency, routing accuracy, retrieval recall, cache freshness, and production telemetry.
